creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Created the upstream bug report.
I'd keep this bug open until the upstream addresses tis issue.

--------

On the side note: I don't know how practically important IPv6 really is.

When I tried to add IPv6 with my internet provider (Comcast in the US), it was virtually impossible to do. They just recommended to keep IPv4, and couldn't understand why would I need IPv6. Maybe it's just my experience.
